title: Sitemap XML, Index Traversal, Location Rules, and Admission · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed incident review reconstructs sitemap xml, index traversal, location rules, and admission from revision, authorization, seed, URL, policy, response bytes, parsed identity, record provenance, frontier transition, Promise settlement, browser state, report row, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded sitemap discovery ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Validate sitemap and sitemap-index namespaces, UTF-8 XML, escaping, location count, size, and required loc values.
Bound index depth, files, URLs, bytes, redirects, duplicate entries, duration, and cycles before traversal.
Resolve and admit sitemap and page locations through authorization, origin, robots, URL, and SSRF policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
